description_long: This object is a retail box for an Apple iPad Pro, featuring a sleek, rectangular form with a predominantly white exterior. The top of the box displays a vibrant, abstract image representing the iPad Pro's screen, with swirling colors of red, pink, yellow, and black. The sides of the box are minimalist, with the Apple logo centered on two opposing faces and the 'iPad Pro' label on the other two. The box appears to be made of sturdy cardboard with a smooth, matte finish, typical of Apple product packaging. There are no visible buttons, ports, or interactive elements on the exterior, emphasizing a clean and modern design. The overall appearance is premium and instantly recognizable as an Apple product.
description: A sleek, white Apple iPad Pro retail box with a colorful abstract image on top and minimalist branding on the sides. The packaging is sturdy, smooth, and visually premium.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Apple logo centered on the side and the colorful iPad Pro image on top.
description_view_1: Side view with the 'iPad Pro' label and the abstract screen image visible on the top.
description_view_2: Opposite front view, again showing the Apple logo and the vibrant top image.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the 'iPad Pro' label and the abstract image on top.
attribute_screen_presence: No visible screen; the top features a printed image simulating a screen, covering most of the upper surface.
attribute_bezel_design: The printed image on top simulates a tablet with thin, symmetrical black bezels and rounded corners; the actual box has no physical bezel.
attribute_brand_logo: A visible Apple logo is centered on two sides of the box, medium-sized and gray in color.
